patch:
--- a/firmware.c
+++ b/firmware.c
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 
 #define I2C_FLAG_NOSTOP   0x01
 #define I2C_FLAG_NOSTART  0x02
-#define I2C_FLAG_10BIT    0x04
+#define I2C_FLAG_10BIT    0x08
 
 int i2c_init(uint8_t bus, uint32_t freq);
 int i2c_write(uint8_t bus, uint16_t addr, const uint8_t *data, uint16_t len, uint8_t flags);
description: Changed the value of the I2C_FLAG_10BIT macro from 0x04 to 0x08, breaking any caller that uses this flag in bitfield operations or stores it numerically.
